name: Jim Henson's Creature Shop Challenge
overview: Ten aspiring creature creators competing to out-imagine one another in a series of challenges where they build everything from mechanical characters to whimsical beasts, bringing high-end creature designs to life. The contestants compete for a prize worth up to $100,000 including the opportunity for the job of a lifetime - a contract working at the world-renowned Jim Henson’s Creature Shop™.

trailers.title: Jim Henson's Creature Shop Challenge Syfy Season 1 Trailer
